_meta.description: PROTIUM decay table — source of truth for nuclear decay examples. Q_MeV and halflife_s are input fields; all PROTIUM quantities are recomputed at notebook load time from protium/constants.py.
_meta.source: protium/constants.py via PROTIUM library — do not hardcode unit values here

decays.name: Tritium decay
decays.notes: Self-referential: hydrogen defines the PROTIUM unit system

decays.name: Bismuth-212 alpha decay
decays.notes: High-energy alpha decay; part of Th-232 chain

decays.name: Uranium-238 alpha decay
decays.notes: Half-life comparable to age of solar system; cosmological anchor

decays.name: Polonium-210 alpha decay
decays.notes: Historically significant; nearly pure alpha emitter

decays.name: Polonium-214 alpha decay
decays.notes: Extremely short-lived; high-energy end of natural alpha range

decays.name: Carbon-14 beta decay
decays.notes: Archaeological timescale anchor; radiometric dating standard
